statement: In every magma, Equation 3042 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * w) * w`) implies Equation 3650 (`x * y = z * ((w * w) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0148
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op w w) z))
